versions.command: F:\WorkDir\locma\.venv\Scripts\locma depot publish e29slim runs/e29slim_s0.zip runs/e29slim_s1.zip runs/e29slim_s2.zip --kind model --note E29 slim extractor - reactive recipe of record (both rungs). Pointer-head net at the exact e28c recipe with the transformer-free SlimTokenExtractor (per-slot embeddings + masked mean/max pooled context + scalar branch, NO cross-card attention; 56.7k extractor params vs 418.5k, 7.4x fewer). Removing the transformer IMPROVED win rate. Trained via 'locma train-zoo --pointer-head --obs-mode token-fx --slim-extractor', seeds 0/1/2. --meta {"avg_hard3_reactive_pure": 0.9026, "avg_hard3_lens_stack": 0.9344, "stack_confirm": 0.9382, "pure3_delta_vs_e28c": 0.0224, "stack_vs_ror_delta": 0.0207, "boardkeep_wr_vs_stack": 0.189, "extractor_params": 56682, "extractor_param_ratio": 7.38} --parent e28c@1
versions.note: E29 slim extractor - reactive recipe of record (both rungs). Pointer-head net at the exact e28c recipe with the transformer-free SlimTokenExtractor (per-slot embeddings + masked mean/max pooled context + scalar branch, NO cross-card attention; 56.7k extractor params vs 418.5k, 7.4x fewer). Removing the transformer IMPROVED win rate. Trained via 'locma train-zoo --pointer-head --obs-mode token-fx --slim-extractor', seeds 0/1/2.
